description: Run the post-draft planning review loop, drive convergence, complete seam review, update the implementation guide when warranted, and decompose the approved plans into beads.

project_name.description: Project or feature whose drafted plans are being reviewed

scope.description: Plan batch, doc set, or corpus scope under review

steps.title: Catalog drafted plans for {{project_name}} in {{scope}}
steps.description: Look for the plan index, the relevant plan docs, and any existing review summary in the repo. Use those artifacts to identify the plans in {{scope}} and verify they are drafted and ready to enter formal review.

steps.title: Run deep review round for {{scope}}
steps.description: Assign independent plan-review work with one document per reviewer so fresh readers can inspect each drafted plan and its test harness deeply.

steps.title: Incorporate deep review findings
steps.description: Run plan-incorporate for each reviewed plan, reach reviewer agreement on all P0 and P1 findings, and update both the plan docs and test harness docs.

steps.title: Summarize convergence after deep review
steps.description: Look for an existing planning review summary first. If one exists, update it; if not, create it. Record finding totals, incorporation rates, and any implementation-guide-worthy cross-cutting issues.

steps.title: Run batch review round for {{scope}}
steps.description: Rotate reviewers onto different plans and review batches of documents together to catch cross-doc inconsistencies and unresolved design gaps.

steps.title: Incorporate batch review findings
steps.description: Apply accepted Round 2 changes, update disposition tables, and keep any deferred or rejected findings documented with explicit rationale.

steps.title: Summarize convergence after batch review
steps.description: Update the planning review summary you found or created earlier and check whether the corpus is trending toward low-volume, high-signal findings.

steps.title: Run full-corpus review before signoff
steps.description: Have one reviewer read the full corpus to catch cross-plan contradictions that deep and batch review can miss.

steps.title: Incorporate full-corpus findings
steps.description: Resolve the remaining high-value cross-document findings and update the corpus so review decisions are reflected in the source docs.

steps.title: Run additional review rounds as needed
steps.description: If convergence has not been reached after the initial deep, batch, and full-corpus passes, keep running more review rounds in whatever mix of deep, batch, and full-corpus review the corpus still needs. Update dispositions and the review summary after each additional round before checking convergence again.

steps.title: Verify review convergence for {{scope}}
steps.description: Use the planning review summary to confirm the review loop has converged. If no summary exists yet, create or update one before deciding. If the corpus still has material unresolved issues, route it back into another review round instead of proceeding.

steps.title: Approve and mark reviewed plans ready for seam review
steps.description: Update plan statuses to Approved only after convergence is verified and all open questions for this review loop are resolved.

steps.title: Run seam review for {{scope}}
steps.description: Look for the plan index, architecture doc, and connected plan docs, then use plan-seam-review after individual reviews converge. Choose the right vertical or horizontal seam coverage for the corpus and loop affected plans back through focused review/incorporation if seam mismatches surface.

steps.title: Update or conditionally create the implementation guide
steps.description: Look for an implementation guide in the repo. If it already exists, update it with review and seam-review invariants. If it does not exist, create it only when this scope belongs to a broader project corpus with more than three total plans.

steps.title: Run plan-to-beads for {{scope}}
steps.description: Look for the plan index, the reviewed plan docs, any addenda, and the implementation guide if present. Then decompose the seam-reviewed plans into implementation beads and capture any bead overlaps or missing work items before implementation begins.
